message:
fix(fp-frame): unblock tight MultiIndex column metadata test (frankenpandas-7jzs)

Another agent had already landed the DataFrameDictAxisLabels enum and
the tight_column_labels helper that emits
DataFrameDictAxisLabels::Multi(tuples) when column_multiindex is
populated, plus column_names sourced from multiindex.names(). Their
corresponding test was referencing DataFrameDictAxisLabels::Multi
without importing the type into the test module, so the library
compiled but the test suite did not.

Adds DataFrameDictAxisLabels to the test-module super:: re-export
list. With that import resolved, the MultiIndex column metadata
test passes:

  test dataframe_to_dict_tight_uses_column_multiindex_metadata ... ok

No implementation changes — the payload logic was already correct
and the assertions already exercised Multi tuples + two-level
column_names (["field", "stat"]).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
